title: Higgs Ticket Semantics
description: HiggsAgent routing semantics layered on top of MuonTickets frontmatter.

higgs_schema_version.description: Semantic contract version used by the Higgs classifier and router.

higgs_platform.description: Primary platform or execution surface for routing decisions.

higgs_complexity.description: Optional explicit complexity override. If omitted, it is derived from effort.

higgs_execution_target.description: Execution preference used by the dispatcher and future hybrid runtime.

higgs_tool_profile.description: Coarse capability hint for allowed tool usage during execution.
